title: Barely Default Data Pack
description: The Barely Default Data Pack made for Mickey Joe's "Barely Default" Resource Pack!
body:
# Introducing: The [Barely Default](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-relatively-improved-default) Data Pack for Minecraft 1.21.11!
This data pack was made specifically for the [Barely Default resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-relatively-improved-default) by none other than the infamous Mickey Joe. This data pack adds so much new content to vanilla playstyle of the game. Its single player and multiplayer friendly, as I spent a lot of time optimizing everything so you could play with your friends!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/TXjzuZmxu8s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Content:
This data pack, as mentioned before, adds a variety of new features to enhance your Minecraft gameplay experience.

### Biomes and Structures
11 new biomes to venture out and explore, some of which contain new structures, new mobs and new atmospheres.

### Mobs
- Entities now wear and wield custom CIT armor and weapons from the Barely Default resource pack
- New variants exist in the world to qualify as a "new" type of mob
- Chance to encounter mini bosses throughout the world, some of which are biome dependent
- Bosses can be summoned and fought against in search of custom loot and items

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/vUYkr6Fs1yA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Enchantments
46 brand new enchantments; the origins are either inspired by Minecraft Dungeons or are uniquely original

### Recipes
- New food items can be crafted or obtained by collecting ingredients or by killing mobs. Some vanilla mob's loot tables may have changed too
- Blocks that normally can only be obtained with silk touch are craftable
- Other miscellaneous items can now be crafted or smelted to make other items

### Banner Patterns
Over 90 new banner pattern designs have been added and can be obtained from the different vanilla banner pattern items.

### Paintings
52 brand new vanilla style paintings.

### Fishing
Over 150 unique fish that can be caught while fishing. To encourage exploration, fish can be caught in different biomes, elevations, weather and even during different times of day.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/cCEmuRnetks" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

As of b3.5, players are now able to fish in lava using a netherite fishing rod!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/yLMrHJa2VIM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Smithing Templates
10 new armor trim patterns and over 30 new armor trim materials to allow players to customize their gear even further.

### Miscellaneous Features
The data pack contains a lot of cool and functional things not mentioned here that you'll have to discover on your own!

### Q&A
**Question:** What version of Minecraft?

**Answer:** 1.21.11.

**Question:** Why do items/mobs look normal for me? - OR - Why are there missing textures?

**Answer:** To reiterate, this data pack was made for the Barely Default resource pack. Make sure you have the [Barely Default resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-relatively-improved-default) enabled as its made to accompany this project. (Also make sure you are using [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or Optifine alternatives like [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)).

**Question:** Is there a Wiki or Google Document page accessible for players that list the features more in depth?

**Answer:** You can access the developing wiki [here](https://barely-default.gitbook.io/barely_default_data_pack_wiki).
